title: Create X Magic Redifined
description: A Redifined version of my old modpack Create X Magic.
body:
This modpack aims to bind the fun of Create and its addons with most of your favourite magic mods together in an ultimate RPG ish modpack!

If you have any questions or suggestions please contact me on discord: denis.1337

To gain access to the official server either DM me on Discord or join the Discord server!
